videoSnippet.title: Not Interested in Draws || Praggnanandhaa vs Alireza  || Norway Chess 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Praggnanandhaa R (2733) - Firouzja, Alireza (2759) 
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [13] 2026.06.01
C50 Giuoco Pianissimo

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Nf6 4.d3 Bc5 5.a3 a6 6.Be3 d6 7.Nbd2 O-O 8.Qe2 Re8 9.Ba2 Be6 10.Bxe6 Rxe6 11.Bxc5 dxc5 12.O-O h6 13.a4 a5 14.Nc4 Qd7 15.g3 b6 16.Kg2 Rd8 17.b3 Re7 18.Rae1 Qe6 19.Nh4 Nd4 20.Qd1 Red7 21.Ne3 c6 22.Nf3 b5 23.Nd2 Qe7 24.Qa1 g6 25.axb5 cxb5 26.Qxa5 Ra7 27.Qc3 Ra2 28.Nf3 b4 29.Qc4 Nxf3 30.Kxf3 Rd4 31.Qb5 Qa7 32.Kg2 Rd8 33.f4 Ra5 34.Qc6 Ra6 35.Ra1 Rxa1 36.Qxf6 Rf8 37.Rf2 exf4 38.Qxf4 h5 39.Nd5 f5 40.Qe5 Qg7 41.Qe6+ Qf7 42.Qd6 Qg7 43.exf5 gxf5 44.Re2 f4 45.Nxf4 Qb7+ 46.Re4 Ra6 47.Qxc5 Rc8 48.Qf5 Rxc2+ 49.Kh3 Qf7 50.Qg5+ Kf8 51.Qd8+
